ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] (Plays) Choose a character from the play and determine where he/she would fit on your Way of the Will chart. Share your reasoning with someone.
[ ] (Plays) Perform the play. Or act out an abridged version such as[ The 30 Minute Shakespeare](https://www.30minuteshakespeare.com/products/a-midsummer-nights-dream-the-30-minute-shakespeare-5?_pos=1&_sid=ca19d7af8&_ss=r).
[ ] (Plays) Movie Recommendations: The Tempest (2010) PG-13

[ ] (Plays) Choose a character from the play and determine where he/she would fit on your Way of the Will chart. Share your reasoning with someone.
[ ] (Plays) Perform the play or act out an abridged version such as [The 30 Minute Shakespeare](https://www.30minuteshakespeare.com/products/a-midsummer-nights-dream-the-30-minute-shakespeare-5?_pos=1&_sid=ca19d7af8&_ss=r).
[ ] (Plays) Movie Recommendations: The Hollow Crown Season 1, Episode 3. Rated TV-14 (please consult a parental guide before watching, consider skipping graphic scenes).

[ ] (Plays) Choose a character from the play and determine where he/she would fit on your Way of the Will chart. Share your reasoning with someone.
[ ] (Plays) Perform the play or act out an abridged version such as [The 30 Minute Shakespeare](https://www.30minuteshakespeare.com/products/a-midsummer-nights-dream-the-30-minute-shakespeare-5?_pos=1&_sid=ca19d7af8&_ss=r). 
[ ] (Plays) Movie Recommendations: The Winter's Tale BBC (1981), Branagh's The Winter's Tale (2015)
[ ] (Plays) Take a [virtual tour](https://www.shakespearesglobe.com/whats-on/globe-theatre-guided-tour/) of Shakespeare's Globe Theatre.
